headline: Your Kids Are Gonna Love It
intro: At Awaken Kids, your children newborn through 5th grade will find a safe, clean, and fun place to discover Jesus on their level. First-time families get VIP check-in treatment.

groups.title: Newborn — 2 Years
groups.description: A safe, nurturing environment for your littlest ones while you worship.

groups.title: 3 — 5 Years
groups.description: Big truths for little hearts. Interactive learning through play, worship, and Bible stories.

groups.title: K — 5th Grade
groups.description: Games, worship, and real teaching that connects kids to Jesus and each other.
